curl_400_adjudication.deployer_observation: deployer's earlier curl probe saw HTTP 400 on dashboard routes
curl_400_adjudication.my_fresh_result: NOT reproducible — /dashboard, /dashboard/jobs, /dashboard/analytics all return 200 via plain curl, browser-UA curl, AND browser-UA+Accept:text/html curl; real-browser Playwright navigation returns main_status 200 for all 15 dashboard routes
curl_400_adjudication.verdict: Transient/probe artifact (likely probed during a web-service restart window or against a stale deploy). Current prod serves 200 for every dashboard route in both curl and real browser.

failed_request_characterization.public_ERR_ABORTED: Next.js <Link> RSC prefetch requests (?_rsc=...) to /forgot-password,/privacy-policy,/terms aborted on navigation after the 2.5s settle — speculative prefetch, not a user-facing failure; the pages themselves return 200 when visited
failed_request_characterization.analytics_ERR_ABORTED: 2x /api/jobs/{id}/insights aborted on navigation; independently re-probed as R1 -> BOTH return HTTP 200 with valid data (jobId/scored/overall/keywordMatch). Not a real failure.

server_log_window.note: 401s in window are expected (logged-out entitlement/auth checks + parallel qa agent traffic)
